info.title: Vidya API
info.description: On-premise College Information & Analytics System. All routes are versioned under /api/v1. The bare /health, /ready and /metrics paths are rewrites of the system module's routes.

sessionAuth.name: vidya_session
sessionAuth.description: Redis-backed session (contract defined in Vidya #1, implemented in Vidya #2). Until then, authenticated routes always return 401.

get.summary: Liveness probe
get.description:
Reports that the process is up and able to serve requests. Also reachable at the conventional alias /health (Next.js rewrite).

**Public route** (no authentication): liveness probes run before any credential exists; exposes no tenant data

get.summary: Readiness probe
get.description:
Verifies Postgres and Redis are reachable and that the replica is not draining. Alias: /ready.

**Public route** (no authentication): readiness probes run before any credential exists; exposes dependency names and boolean state only

get.summary: Prometheus metrics
get.description:
Prometheus text exposition for this replica. Alias: /metrics. Must be network-restricted to the scrape network in production (docs/threat-model.md).

**Public route** (no authentication): scraped by Prometheus without credentials in this phase; restrict at the network layer

post.summary: Log in with username and password
post.description:
Issues a Redis-backed session (HttpOnly cookie). Throttled per user+IP; repeated failures lock the account window. Successful logins audit with the authenticated user as actor; failures are audited by the service.

**Public route** (no authentication): credential establishment — the caller has no session yet

200.description: Session issued; Set-Cookie header carries the session token

401.description: Invalid credentials (uniform for unknown user / wrong password / disabled account)

403.description: Password reset required before login

429.description: Too many failed attempts; retry after the lockout window

post.summary: Log out (invalidate the current session)
post.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.summary: Describe the current session (whoami)
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

post.summary: Change own password
post.description:
Requires the current password. Invalidates every session of the user.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

post.summary: Redeem a one-time reset token and set a new password
post.description:
Tokens are admin-issued (no self-service email flow until the notifications module exists — ADR-0011), single-use, short-TTL. Invalidates every session of the user.

**Public route** (no authentication): the caller has no session — possession of the one-time token is the credential

200.description: Password set; account active; sessions invalidated

401.description: Token invalid, expired or already used

429.description: Too many attempts from this address

post.summary: Create a user (admin)
post.description:
Creates the account in must_reset status with a temporary password; the user must complete a password reset before first login.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.summary: List users of a college (admin)
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Admin scope does not cover this college

get.summary: Read a user profile (self, or admin within scope)
get.description:
Record-level access is decided by the scope-check chokepoint (self-access rule or admin support-read).

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Scope check denied

patch.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

put.description:
Revoked roles cascade away their scope grants. Invalidates the user's sessions.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

post.summary: Add a scope grant (admin)
post.description:
Org identifiers follow the #3 contract and are recorded verified=false until the OrgDirectory exists. The user must already hold the grant's role. Invalidates the user's sessions.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

409.description: User does not hold the grant's role

delete.description:
Invalidates the user's sessions.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

post.summary: Verify unverified scope grants against the org tree (admin)
post.description:
Backfill for grants created before the people module existed (#3): checks each verified=false grant's org path and subject against the OrgDirectory, flips resolvable ones to verified, and reports the rest. Grants are never deleted by this run.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

503.description: Org directory unavailable (people module not wired)

post.summary: Issue a one-time password-reset token (admin)
post.description:
Returns the token to the ADMIN for out-of-band delivery. The token itself is never logged or audited — only its issuance.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.summary: List colleges the caller can read
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.summary: The full org tree of a college
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Scope check denied

post.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

post.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

post.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

post.summary: Create a subject under a department (admin)
post.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

patch.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

delete.description:
Deletion is RESTRICT: units with children or references answer 409.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

post.summary: Create a student (admin)
post.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.summary: Read a student (scope-checked at the student's org position)
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Scope check denied

patch.summary: Update a student — rename or move through the lifecycle (admin)
patch.description:
Status transitions are audited and the record is never destroyed (TC / marksheet / audit retention). Moving to backlog / year_back / transferred / dropped / alumni is how a student's lifecycle is recorded.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

post.summary: Enroll or transfer a student into a section
post.description:
Withdraws the year's live enrollment (if any) and creates the new one. Admin college-wide; class_teacher within their class per the matrix's promotion clause — the scope check runs against BOTH the source and the target section.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Scope check denied (source or target)

post.summary: Link (or unlink) the student to an identity sign-in (admin)
post.description:
W1 student portal: the link is the student's ONLY access authority — students hold no scope grants. One sign-in per student (unique).

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

409.description: That sign-in is already linked to another student

get.summary: The live roster of a section
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Scope check denied

post.summary: Create a teacher record (admin)
post.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.summary: Read a teacher (self-access via the identity link, else scope)
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Scope check denied

patch.description:
Setting status=inactive removes the teacher's derived grants (ADR-0015).

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

post.summary: Link (or unlink) the teacher to an identity user (admin)
post.description:
Linking derives grants for the teacher's existing assignments; unlinking removes them (ADR-0015).

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

200.description: Link updated; grant sync counts included

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

post.summary: Assign a teacher to a class (admin) — derives the identity grant
post.description:
subject_teacher requires subjectId; class_teacher forbids it. The derived grant is class-level per the approved policy; failure to derive rolls the assignment back.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

201.description: Assignment created (grant derived when the teacher is linked)

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

delete.summary: Remove an assignment (admin) — removes the derived grant first
delete.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.summary: List a class's teacher assignments
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Scope check denied

post.summary: Start a bulk CSV import of students or teachers (admin)
post.description:
CSV only (export from Excel). Students: admission_no, full_name and optionally department_code+class_code+section_name (requires academicYear). Teachers: staff_no, full_name. Runs in the worker; poll GET /imports/{id}. dryRun validates and reports without writing.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.summary: Import status, counts and per-row errors (admin)
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Scope check denied

post.summary: Record a session's attendance (subject teacher's period, or a class teacher's whole-section session)
post.description:
Creates the session with the full roster's entries in one call. Pass a subjectId to record a subject teacher's own period (a SUBJECT record — only that subject's teacher may write it); omit it for a whole-section session (only the class teacher). Every entry must belong to the section's live roster.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

409.description: Session already exists for this section/date/slot

422.description: Entries outside the section's live roster

patch.summary: Correct one attendance entry (owning subject teacher or the class teacher; audited with before/after)
patch.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.summary: One session with its entries
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Scope check denied

get.summary: A section's sessions in a date range
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Scope check denied

get.summary: Per-student attendance for a section's roster (the teacher flashcard feed)
get.description:
One card per student: attendance counts, percentage, and a recent-session strip — computed only over the sessions the caller may read (row-filtered by the ScopeChecker, so a subject teacher sees their own period). Pass subjectId to scope the numbers to one subject.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

200.description: A card per student who has any visible attendance

403.description: Scope check denied

get.summary: A student's attendance record (rows the caller's scope covers)
get.description:
Row-filtered by the ScopeChecker: each session is checked at its own stored org path; counts are computed over granted rows only.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

post.summary: Create an assessment (the subject's teacher)
post.description:
Marks are SUBJECT records: creation requires the caller's teacher grant for exactly this class + subject. The subject must belong to the class's department.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

409.description: Duplicate assessment name for this class/subject/year

422.description: Subject does not belong to the class's department

delete.summary: Delete an assessment without marks (the subject's teacher)
delete.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.summary: One assessment
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Scope check denied

get.summary: A class's assessments the caller may see (row-filtered by subject scope)
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

put.summary: Enter or update a marksheet in bulk (the subject's teacher)
put.description:
All-or-nothing: every entry is validated (score within maxScore, student enrolled in the class) before any write; the audit event carries per-entry before/after diffs (grade-change integrity).

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

422.description: Invalid entries (score range / not enrolled in this class)

get.summary: An assessment's marks
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Scope check denied

patch.summary: Correct one mark (the subject's teacher; audited with before/after)
patch.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.summary: A student's marks the caller may see (row-filtered by subject scope)
get.description:
Each mark is checked at its assessment's stored class path + subjectId — a subject teacher sees only their own subject's rows.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.summary: A mark's complete change history (from the append-only audit log)
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Scope check denied

get.summary: The caller's role-adaptive dashboard (the permission mirror)
get.description:
Tiles are derived from the caller's grants — the response contains only nodes their scope covers, and every number inside is served under constituent-closure + the minimum-cohort rule (ADR-0018).

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.summary: Attendance + marks rollups for one org node
get.description:
Attendance and single-subject marks check the node's constituent ref; the cross-subject overall is served only under explicit per-subject closure. Aggregates under the minimum cohort are withheld as a designed state.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: The caller's scope covers nothing at this node

get.summary: At-risk students under a node (field-gated per caller)
get.description:
Each entry is component-gated: attendance figures for callers covering the student's section; per-subject scores per subject scope; the overall figure and the low-marks reason only under full cross-subject closure. Entries with no visible flagged reason are omitted.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.summary: One student's attendance + marks trends (live, filtered at source)
get.description:
Computed fresh from #4's read model with the ScopeChecker run PER RECORD before any arithmetic. The overall average appears only when no mark was filtered out (closure).

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

200.description: The caller's view of this student

403.description: No record of this student is within the caller's scope

post.summary: Rebuild a year's rollups now (admin)
post.description:
Enqueues the same worker job the nightly schedule runs. Audited.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.summary: Compare a node's children (departments / classes / sections)
get.description:
Each child's attendance + overall marks are served through the same constituent-closure and minimum-cohort path as a rollup; children the caller can't read come back as designed 'denied' states, not errors.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.summary: Marks/attendance distribution histogram (class or section)
get.description:
Server-side histogram COUNTS only (never identifiable rows), withheld below the minimum cohort. Class or section only — aggregate levels use /compare.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

post.summary: Request a report (202 + poll)
post.description:
The requested target is scope-checked against the caller before the job is enqueued (403 if they couldn't read the underlying records). Generation runs in the worker with the caller's scope snapshot; the report is a disclosure surface — it inherits constituent-closure and the minimum-cohort rule (ADR-0018/0020).

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: The target is outside the caller's scope

404.description: No such target (student / section / class / node)

get.summary: List the caller's recent reports
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

get.summary: Report status (requester only)
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Not the requester

get.summary: Download the generated artifact (scope-checked, not URL-secret)
get.description:
Downloadable only by its requester AND only while their current scope still covers the target — an out-of-scope caller (URL guess) or a requester whose scope was revoked gets 403 before any bytes are read. Every download is audited (ADR-0020).

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Not the requester, or outside current scope

get.summary: The signed-in student's own profile + live enrollment
get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

404.description: This sign-in is not linked to a student record

404.description: This sign-in is not linked to a student record

200.description: Today's ordered periods (empty on Sundays or when unenrolled)

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

404.description: This sign-in is not linked to a student record

get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

put.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

409 names the busy resource (section/teacher/room). 422 when the subject does not belong to the section's department.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

409.description: Section, teacher or room already booked in that period

422.description: Subject not of the section's department

delete.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

get.description: **Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

404.description: This sign-in is not linked to a teacher record

post.description:
Idempotent: students already invoiced for a structure are skipped, so re-running after enrolling more students only invoices the new ones. Poll fees.generate-get for progress.

get.summary: Compile a class's results live (admin/principal) — marks read model × credits × scale
get.description:
Computes SGPA per student from the year's marks: per subject, the mean assessment percent is banded by the scale; SGPA = Σ(points×credits)/Σcredits. Nothing is stored — publishing (results.publish) is what makes a term visible to students.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).

403.description: Access denied by the role/scope policy (problem+json)

422.description: No credits set for this class/year — set credits first

get.summary: The signed-in student's published results (self via the identity link)
get.description:
The publication gate: only published terms appear. An unpublished term is absent — the portal renders the withheld state.

post.summary: Schedule a paper (admin) — clash with the weekly timetable WARNS, never blocks
post.description:
The response's optional `clash` string names the busy room (e.g. "Room 12 busy: BSc-1 Physics") when the slot's date/time lands on a timetabled lesson in the same room. Exams routinely displace lessons, so this is advisory.

**Requires authentication.** Until Vidya #2 ships the session authenticator, every request receives 401 (deny-by-default gate).
